actions.value:
You can check the status of your Simplex order here: https://payment-status.simplex.com/#/


If you have any questions about your account with them, or a specific transaction, please reach out to directly to support@simplex.com -or- you can create a support ticket here: https://support.simplex.com/hc/en-gb/requests/new


They are often really responsive when troubleshooting order issues.
